action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 11 trained with all 12 layers from both ViTs (19968-dim features) achieved 89.24% val accuracy (SWA), up from 89.10% with 6 layers. This is a modest improvement. Analysis: The all-layer features provide more information but also more noise/redundancy. The current predict.py has MC dropout + flip TTA + SWA ensemble which previously boosted test accuracy from 88.01% to 88.66%. Decision: Submit the current best.pt for eval to get the test score baseline, then plan improvements based on results.
